description_long: This object consists of three modern, multi-story houses arranged side by side, each with a flat roof and a fenced backyard. The facades feature large rectangular windows, pastel-colored exteriors in blue, green, and white, and minimalistic landscaping with shrubs and small trees. The houses have rooftop terraces, visible balconies, and outdoor amenities such as a swing set and a hot tub in the backyards. The entryways are recessed with small steps and simple doors, and the rear yards are enclosed by wooden fences. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on open, light-filled interiors and private outdoor spaces. The houses are separated by narrow walkways and have distinct, yet harmonious, architectural details.
description: A row of three modern, flat-roofed houses with large windows, pastel exteriors, rooftop terraces, and fenced backyards featuring outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades, entryways, large windows, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the houses, backyard fences, and outdoor play equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyards, patios, and rooftop terraces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional backyard features, hot tub, and the rear entrances.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryways with simple doors, small steps, and minimalistic landscaping
